items.title: Last Night in Baseball: Yankees Finish Off Road Sweep of Struggling Red Sox
items.summary: The Red Sox can't score and the Yankees took advantage all series, the Padres come from behind to win, a Braves rookie takes a lesson to heart immediately and more from Thursday...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Is running bad for your knees? The truth behind the claims
items.summary: The London Marathon has got people hyped about running - but is it ACTUALLY good for you?
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Ex-Brighton boss Hughton reveals cancer diagnosis
items.summary: Former Brighton and Newcastle manager Chris Hughton reveals he was treated for prostate cancer last year.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
